templates.name: Instagram Download Button
templates.description: Adds a single download button widget to Instagram posts, stories, reels, highlights, and profile pictures. Click to reveal a popup panel with the currently viewed media download, individual items, and a Download All option for carousels.
templates.author: Browser Automata

scripts.name: Instagram Download Button
scripts.description: Injects a single download trigger per post that opens a dark popup panel with current-media and multi-download options. Handles photos, videos, carousels, stories, reels, highlights, and profile pictures with SPA-aware re-processing.
